$primary_base_url_label.zh: 主集群 API 基础 URL

$primary_base_url_desc.en: Primary Dashboard API base URL, for example https://primary.example.com:18083/api/v5.
$primary_base_url_desc.zh: 主集群 Dashboard API 基础 URL，例如 https://primary.example.com:18083/api/v5。

$primary_api_key_desc.en: Primary cluster API key. Use file://PATH to read the value from a local file.
$primary_api_key_desc.zh: 主集群 API key。可使用 file://PATH 从本地文件读取。

$primary_api_secret_desc.en: Primary cluster API secret. Use file://PATH to read the value from a local file.
$primary_api_secret_desc.zh: 主集群 API secret。可使用 file://PATH 从本地文件读取。

$primary_ssl_enable_desc.en: Enable custom TLS options for HTTPS calls to the primary cluster.
$primary_ssl_enable_desc.zh: 为访问主集群的 HTTPS 请求启用自定义 TLS 选项。

$primary_ssl_sni_desc.en: TLS SNI hostname. Use disable to omit SNI.
$primary_ssl_sni_desc.zh: TLS SNI 主机名。设置为 disable 表示不发送 SNI。

$primary_ssl_verify_desc.en: Use verify_peer with cacertfile for private or self-signed Dashboard certificates.
$primary_ssl_verify_desc.zh: 对于私有 CA 或自签名 Dashboard 证书，请配合 cacertfile 使用 verify_peer。

$primary_ssl_cacertfile_desc.en: Path to the trusted CA certificate file used when verify is verify_peer.
$primary_ssl_cacertfile_desc.zh: verify 为 verify_peer 时使用的可信 CA 证书文件路径。

$primary_ssl_certfile_desc.en: Path to the optional client certificate file.
$primary_ssl_certfile_desc.zh: 可选的客户端证书文件路径。

$primary_ssl_keyfile_desc.en: Path to the optional client private key file.
$primary_ssl_keyfile_desc.zh: 可选的客户端私钥文件路径。

$sync_root_keys_desc.en: Configuration root keys to export from the primary cluster. Supported values: connectors, actions, sources, rule_engine, listeners, schema_registry, authentication, authorization. When rule_engine is selected, include its dependent connectors, actions, sources, and schema_registry roots unless they already exist on the secondary cluster.
$sync_root_keys_desc.zh: 从主集群导出的配置根键。支持的值：connectors、actions、sources、rule_engine、listeners、schema_registry、authentication、authorization。选择 rule_engine 时，除非依赖对象已存在于备集群，否则应同时包含 connectors、actions、sources 和 schema_registry。

$sync_table_sets_desc.en: Mnesia table sets to export and replace on the secondary cluster. Supported values: banned, builtin_authn, builtin_authz, builtin_retainer, psk, mt. Set to an empty list for configuration-only synchronization. Primary API-key export does not include dashboard_users or api_keys.
$sync_table_sets_desc.zh: 导出并在备集群替换的 Mnesia 表集合。支持的值：banned、builtin_authn、builtin_authz、builtin_retainer、psk、mt。设置为空列表表示仅同步配置。主集群 API-key 导出不包含 dashboard_users 或 api_keys。

$sync_timeout_desc.en: HTTP request timeout for calls to the primary cluster.
$sync_timeout_desc.zh: 访问主集群时的 HTTP 请求超时时间。

$sync_retain_remote_backup_desc.en: Retain the exported backup file on the primary cluster after synchronization.
$sync_retain_remote_backup_desc.zh: 同步完成后保留主集群上导出的备份文件。

$sync_retain_backup_after_import_desc.en: Retain the uploaded local backup file after import.
$sync_retain_backup_after_import_desc.zh: 导入后保留上传到本地的备份文件。
